messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0150",
  "title": "Gossip Harbor",
  "page_index": 90,
  "page_range": "90-91"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0151",
    "title": "Gossip Harbor 2025优质在投创意",
    "page_range": "91-92",
    "summary": "This section answers retrieval questions regarding Gossip Harbor’s 2025 advertising strategy and creative performance. It covers:\n- **Topics & Entities:** High-performing ad creatives for the game Gossip Harbor; data sourced from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module.\n- **Dates & Timeframes:** Analysis window spans January–December 2025; the product’s first ad launch occurred in February 2025.\n- **Metrics & Claims:** Video formats dominate at 82.2%, followed by images at 15.7%; total cumulative deduplicated creatives across dual platforms equal 63,000.\n- **Definitions & Procedures:** Defines \"high-quality active creatives\" as assets with high new impressions or popularity/heat within the selected timeframe. Includes a user procedure to click images to play full creative videos.\n- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Features interactive visual ad examples (clickable image/video thumbnails) and quantitative campaign metrics backed by third-party ad intelligence platform analytics."
  }
]

message.content: This section covers the 2025 advertising strategy and creative performance for the game Gossip Harbor, utilizing data from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module. It analyzes high-performing ad creatives within a January–December 2025 timeframe, noting the product’s initial ad launch in February 2025. Key metrics and claims indicate that video formats dominate at 82.2%, followed by images at 15.7%, with a total of 63,000 cumulative deduplicated creatives across dual platforms. The section defines "high-quality active creatives" as assets generating high new impressions or popularity/heat during the analysis period, and outlines a user procedure to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos. Evidence is presented through interactive figures (clickable ad examples) and quantitative campaign metrics derived from third-party ad intelligence platform analytics. No tables are visible in this section.

   - *Metrics & Claims:* Video formats = 82.2%, Image formats = 15.7%; total cumulative deduplicated creatives = 63,000 across dual platforms.
   - *Definitions & Procedures:* "High-quality active creatives" = assets with high new impressions or popularity/heat in the timeframe. Procedure: click images to play full creative videos.

response_text: This section covers the 2025 advertising strategy and creative performance for the game Gossip Harbor, utilizing data from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module. It analyzes high-performing ad creatives within a January–December 2025 timeframe, noting the product’s initial ad launch in February 2025. Key metrics and claims indicate that video formats dominate at 82.2%, followed by images at 15.7%, with a total of 63,000 cumulative deduplicated creatives across dual platforms. The section defines "high-quality active creatives" as assets generating high new impressions or popularity/heat during the analysis period, and outlines a user procedure to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos. Evidence is presented through interactive figures (clickable ad examples) and quantitative campaign metrics derived from third-party ad intelligence platform analytics. No tables are visible in this section.
